dct_description_sm: auctore Antonio Ienkensono Anglo, edita Londini 1562 & dedicata illustriss. D. Henrico Sÿdneo Walli[a]e pr[a]esidi
Bar scales on map ("Scala miliarium") in lower center: "Rußica", "Anglica", "Hispanica"
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
"Rvssia aut potius magni dvcis Mos-coviae imperivm" with Latin text on verso and 46 in lower right
Ortelius based his map on Jenkinson's 1562 map, Nova absolutaque Russiae, Moscoviae, et Tartariae descriptio. cf. Tooley's dictionary of mapmakers, v. 2, p. 437
